title: October 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 6''' is the 279th day of the year (280th in leap years). There are 86 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[John Knoll]] is born.
*[[1980]] – The [[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|''Han Solo at Stars' End'' comic strip]] begins publication.
*[[1992]] – [[Classic Star Wars 2|''Classic Star Wars'' 2]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 68|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 68]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire (TPB)|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'']] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi 4|''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 4]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Republic 46|''Republic'' 46]] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Procedure]]'' published [[StarWars.com|online]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes]]'' released.
*2009 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars - Clone Weapons Training]]'' released on StarWars.com.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Old Republic 4: Blood of the Empire, Part 1]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – "[[A War on Two Fronts]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Servants of the Empire: The Secret Academy]]'' published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars: Droid Factory|''Droid Factory'']] published.
*2015 – ''[[The Rise of the Empire]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' Open Beta begins.
*[[2019]] – "[[Into the Unknown]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars Origami 2: 34 More Projects from a Galaxy Far, Far Away....]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[The Saga of Rey]]'' published in [[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]].
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Marvel Comics Covers, Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: The Poster Collection]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Battle Stations Activity Book and Model]]'' published in the United States.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi Book and Model]]'' published in the United States.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue One Book and Model]]'' published in the United States.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Smuggler's Starship Activity Book and Model]]'' published in the United States.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 9|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 9]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle 3|''Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle'' 3]] published.
*2021 – [[Gerald Home]] died.
*[[2024]] – "[[Tower Run / The Jumping Jetpack]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
